refusal_reasons.reason: A PR86 exact CUDA contest_auth_eval.json with 600 samples and matching archive identity must exist before PR86 can justify a dispatchable contract port.
PR86 tokens.bin must fully decode, then byte-exactly re-encode through the pinned HPAC/constriction contract.
A PR85 HPAC-coded candidate must decode to the same PR85 raw tokens before archive replacement is allowed.
The PR85 inflate/runtime output must be byte- or tensor-parity equivalent before any exact eval dispatch.
A candidate archive must be deterministic, sidecar-free, manifest-complete, and byte-closed.

fail_closed_reasons.next_action: Classify the current PR86 replay blocker; do not claim score from external PR text or partial Lightning artifacts.
fail_closed_reasons.reason: A PR86 exact CUDA contest_auth_eval.json with 600 samples and matching archive identity must exist before PR86 can justify a dispatchable contract port.

fail_closed_reasons.next_action: Run the local PR86 full-stream decode and decode->encode tokens.bin byte-parity probe.
fail_closed_reasons.reason: PR86 tokens.bin must fully decode, then byte-exactly re-encode through the pinned HPAC/constriction contract.

fail_closed_reasons.next_action: After PR85 HPAC fitting, require decoded-token SHA and byte-closed runtime parity against the PR85 baseline.
fail_closed_reasons.reason: A PR85 HPAC-coded candidate must decode to the same PR85 raw tokens before archive replacement is allowed.

fail_closed_reasons.next_action: Run PR85 runtime output parity after token parity passes.
fail_closed_reasons.reason: The PR85 inflate/runtime output must be byte- or tensor-parity equivalent before any exact eval dispatch.

fail_closed_reasons.next_action: Build only after PR86 and PR85 token parity gates pass.
fail_closed_reasons.reason: A candidate archive must be deterministic, sidecar-free, manifest-complete, and byte-closed.

gross_byte_math.interpretation: Gross byte opportunity only. It is not a score delta and is non-dispatchable until the parity gates pass.

next_dispatch_gate.next_action: Classify the current PR86 replay blocker; do not claim score from external PR text or partial Lightning artifacts.

next_gate.next_action: Run the local PR86 full-stream decode and decode->encode tokens.bin byte-parity probe.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Regenerate the PR86 anatomy artifact from the exact archive before planning a port.
required_parity_gates.requirement: PR86 anatomy must match the known archive SHA-256, bytes, and five member byte sizes.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Fix the PR86 archive custody/member anatomy before using HPAC bytes as a design prior.
required_parity_gates.requirement: PR86 anatomy must show exactly the expected members with no sidecars or unsafe names.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Resolve token semantics against PR86 inflate/training code before port planning.
required_parity_gates.requirement: Submitted PR86 tokens.bin must be raw-token uint32 queue words, not residual-token or ambiguous semantics.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Refresh the PR85 bundle profile from the exact PR85 archive before computing byte economics.
required_parity_gates.requirement: PR85 profile must match the known T4-best archive and QMA9 mask segment byte count.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Recompute from source artifacts; do not carry forward stale byte arithmetic.
required_parity_gates.requirement: Gross PR85 mask opportunity must be recomputed from profile bytes before any port decision.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Classify the current PR86 replay blocker; do not claim score from external PR text or partial Lightning artifacts.
required_parity_gates.requirement: A PR86 exact CUDA contest_auth_eval.json with 600 samples and matching archive identity must exist before PR86 can justify a dispatchable contract port.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Run the local PR86 full-stream decode and decode->encode tokens.bin byte-parity probe.
required_parity_gates.requirement: PR86 tokens.bin must fully decode, then byte-exactly re-encode through the pinned HPAC/constriction contract.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Extract PR85 QMA9 raw tokens with shape/range/SHA proof before fitting HPAC.
required_parity_gates.requirement: Decode PR85 QMA9 mask bytes into the exact raw token source that HPAC would consume.

parity_artifact_gate.requirement: For PR85, prove decoded mask-token shape/range, raw-token parity against the PR85 baseline token source, archive byte closure, and runtime output parity before any exact-eval dispatch.

required_parity_gates.next_action: After PR85 HPAC fitting, require decoded-token SHA and byte-closed runtime parity against the PR85 baseline.
required_parity_gates.requirement: A PR85 HPAC-coded candidate must decode to the same PR85 raw tokens before archive replacement is allowed.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Run PR85 runtime output parity after token parity passes.
required_parity_gates.requirement: The PR85 inflate/runtime output must be byte- or tensor-parity equivalent before any exact eval dispatch.

required_parity_gates.next_action: Build only after PR86 and PR85 token parity gates pass.
required_parity_gates.requirement: A candidate archive must be deterministic, sidecar-free, manifest-complete, and byte-closed.

reasons: This planner is build-only and never emits a score claim.
External PR text and partial replay artifacts are carried as context only.
PR86 exact score evidence is a required gate, not a score claimed by this plan.

token_stream_contract.why_not_drop_in: PR86 tokens.bin is raw uint32 queue-coded HPAC tokens tied to PR86 HPAC probabilities. PR85 uses a QMA9 mask segment inside a different bundle/runtime contract.
